hero.title: Craftsmanship that transforms your space
hero.subtitle: Custom kitchen cabinets, closets, and vanities with premium materials and high-quality finishes in Hialeah Gardens, FL.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We design and manufacture custom furniture to your taste, size, and color. Pladeva materials, high-quality MDF and premium hardware.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Custom cabinets manufacturing and installation with premium materials and high-quality finishes.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Cabinets
kitchen.description: Design, manufacturing and installation of custom kitchen cabinets. From simple laminate to high-quality lacquered cabinets. 100% customizable with LED lighting and soft-close.

closets.title: Closets & Wardrobes
closets.description: Manufacturing of custom closets and wardrobes optimizing every available space. Includes organizers for spices, waves and baskets. Modular design adaptable to any space.

vanities.title: Bathroom Vanities
vanities.description: Custom bathroom vanities combining functionality and modern aesthetics. Moisture resistance with quality materials, optional LED lighting and soft-close.

header.title: Our Services
header.subtitle: Specialists in custom kitchen cabinets, closets and vanities in Hialeah Gardens and nearby Miami areas.

cards.title: Kitchen Cabinets
cards.description: Custom design from simple laminate to high-end lacquer. Pladeva structure, MDF doors, LED lighting and soft-close.

cards.title: Closets & Wardrobes
cards.description: Maximum storage capacity with special organizers. Modular design adaptable to any space in your home.

cards.title: Bathroom Vanities
cards.description: Functionality and modern aesthetics with moisture resistance. Soft-close drawers and LED lighting options.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about our cabinet manufacturing and installation services.

items.question: What materials do you use in manufacturing?
items.answer: All our furniture is made from Pladeva (Puyooz) with finishes on doors and drawers of high-quality MDF.

items.question: What type of hardware do you include?
items.answer: We have high-quality hardware, providing our clients with organizers for spices, waves, and baskets.

items.question: Do you have modern options like lighting?
items.answer: Yes, we incorporate a touch of modernity with LED lights, bridges, and soft-close drawers.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We are specialists in the manufacturing and installation of kitchen cabinets and closets.

items.question: What is the quality level of your work?
items.answer: We are specialists in work carried out with a 100% quality level of vigor and finishing.

items.question: What finish ranges do you have available?
items.answer: Our ranges go from the simple laminate range to the complexity of lacquered cabinets with high-quality paints.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer: We are located at 9809 NW 80th Ave Suite 9-G, Hialeah Gardens, FL 33016.

items.question: What are your business hours?
items.answer: Our business hours are Monday to Saturday from 9 am to 6 pm.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept Cash, Zelle, and checks. We offer special discounts.

items.question: How can I contact you?
items.answer: You can contact us via WhatsApp at (786) 945-5265 or by email at randyortega870317@gmail.com.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are ready to transform your space. Request your free quote today.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a company specialized in the manufacturing and installation of kitchen cabinets, closets, and vanities, designing and elaborating them to the taste, size, and color chosen by our clients. We are specialists in work carried out with a 100% quality level of vigor and finishing.
about.mission_text: To design and elaborate kitchen cabinets, closets, and vanities to the taste, size, and color chosen by our clients, with a 100% quality level of vigor and finishing.
about.vision_text: Our ranges go from the simple laminate range to the complexity of lacquered cabinets with high-quality paints.
about.value1_text: All our furniture is made from Pladeva (Puyooz) with finishes on doors and drawers of high-quality MDF.
about.value2_text: We have high-quality hardware, providing our clients with organizers for spices, waves, and baskets.
about.value3_text: We incorporate a touch of modernity with LED lights, bridges, and soft-close drawers.
